subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! The absolute bounty hath filled the world of humanity like unto a brimming cup, and all peoples have been summoned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق فیض مطلق جهان انسانرا مانند جام جم سرشار نمود و جمیع امم را صلای
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God
